description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagresiec_2, and is implemented by a call to setdiagresiec_2. Use this API to specify the IEC annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. setdiagresiec(annot, type, fltbus, boe, contrib, frm, to, last, id, style, width, color)
python_syntax: setdiagresiec(annot, type, fltbus, boe, contrib, frm, to, last, id, style, width, color)

parameters.name: contrib
parameters.description: Specifies contributions at home bus for bus faults. (input).

parameters.name: frm
parameters.description: Specifies the from bus if a line fault is applied. (input).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Specifies the to bus if a line fault is applied. (input).

parameters.name: last
parameters.description: Specifies the third bus if a line fault is applied to a 3-winding transformer. (input).

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Line style applied to the faulted bus diagram item. (input).

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Line width applied to the faulted bus diagram item, >= 1. (input).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color for diagram items that are faulted. (input).

boe.description: fault located at the faulted bus.
fault located at the faulted bus with lines outaged.
fault located at the end of lines.

contrib.description: contributions at home bus for all faulted buses for selected fault.
